summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete per explicit task requirements. Missing: (1) SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1 test file (workflow line 19 references it but file not provided); (2) no fixture files (task requires mock commit logs); (3) no act-result.txt artifact; (4) no actionlint validation evidence; (5) no TDD test-first methodology shown. Code itself has issues: bump-version.ps1 line 13 uses unsupported (?m) anchor in PowerShell -split; missing file existence check before read; module missing $ErrorActionPreference. Workflow structure is sound (proper permissions, outputs, shell: pwsh usage) but incomplete without tests. Task demands were explicit and non-negotiable—50% code delivery + missing core TDD/testing/validation work = unshippable.
